metadata.description: Personal collection of Agent Skills for agent design, evaluation, and knowledge management.

plugins.name: agent-eval
plugins.description: Designs and runs evaluations for LLM or agent outputs — rubrics, LLM-as-judge scoring, regression test sets, and pass-rate reporting.

plugins.name: deid-reid-harness
plugins.description: Adversarial de-identification vs re-identification eval harness for clinical text — generates synthetic notes with ground-truth identifier spans, a background population, and diagnosis-free inference vignettes, then scores three attacks separately: Safe Harbor leakage (Track 1), Expert Determination re-id risk (Track 2: k-anonymity + prosecutor/journalist/marketer), and free-text inference (Track 3: recovering a withheld diagnosis, with an agent-eval judge path). All three verified offline; LLM attacker/judge is a documented swap-in.

plugins.name: wiki-operator
plugins.description: Operates a Karpathy-style personal knowledge wiki via Obsidian MCP — searches before writing, updates existing concept pages over creating duplicates, merges redundant notes, and maintains links. Requires Obsidian MCP connected.

plugins.name: wiki-synthesizer
plugins.description: Compiles raw material into the wiki — promotes flagged ideas from journal entries into Knowledge/ concept pages and compiles Sources/raw/ files into source pages. Run after learning sessions to crystallize captured knowledge. Requires Obsidian MCP connected.

plugins.name: wiki-librarian
plugins.description: Maintains structural health of the wiki — audits for broken links, orphan pages, stale notes, near-duplicates, and contradictions. Proposes fixes with user confirmation. Run weekly or before a major synthesis session. Requires Obsidian MCP connected.
